creator: bacon@smithers.neuro.mcw.edu
text:
diff -ruN /usr/ports/math/vtk43-headers/Makefile vtk43-headers/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/math/vtk43-headers/Makefile      Fri Aug  4 12:56:12 2006
+++ vtk43-headers/Makefile      Tue Dec  5 15:15:53 2006
@@ -11,6 +11,9 @@
 
 MASTERDIR=     ${.CURDIR}/../vtk43
 
+DEPRECATED=    Please use vtk 4.4 or 5.x.
+EXPIRATION_DATE=       2007-02-01
+
 .include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile"
 
 post-patch:
